'''''Cloud-Mother''''' was the name of a floating [[Ithorian Herdship|herd city]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]].

==History==
It was best known for its [[Medcenter/Legends|hospitals]], glass manufacturing, guest centers, and large [[Spaceport/Legends|shuttleport]]. In the [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] [[Herd Meet/Legends|Herd Meet]], it was where the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] delegation was housed, in the [[Presidential Guest House]].

{{City-stub}}

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
